title: T-001 — Reference table quality_hold_reasons (02-SETTINGS §8 extension)
prompt:
# T-001 — Reference table quality_hold_reasons

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_holds.reason_code_id, §16.3 02-SETTINGS additions, ADR-034 (industry-configurable taxonomies)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register `quality_hold_reasons` as a reference table row-set in 02-SETTINGS reference_tables (already-modeled by 02-SETTINGS §8) so 09-QUALITY hold creation can FK `reason_code_id` to a tenant-configurable taxonomy with `default_hold_duration_days` per row.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0090_quality_hold_reasons_reftable.sql` inserts a row into `reference_tables` with code `quality_hold_reasons`, schema_json containing fields `code text`, `label text`, `category text`, `default_hold_duration_days int`, `default_priority text`, `i18n jsonb`.
2. Seed 8 baseline rows into `reference_tables_rows` (contamination=7d, temperature=2d, documentation=5d, foreign_object=10d, microbiological=14d, allergen_cross_contact=7d, weight_variance=3d, other=5d) with `default_priority` mapping per row.
3. Server-side TypeScript helper `apps/web/src/server/quality/holdReasons.ts` exporting `getHoldReasonOptions(orgId)` returning rows ordered by category + label.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0090_quality_hold_reasons_reftable.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/holdReasons.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/holdReasons.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0090 applied, when SELECT * FROM reference_tables WHERE code='quality_hold_reasons' runs, then 1 row exists with the schema_json above and 8 reference_tables_rows exist for it scoped to seed org_id
2. Given an authenticated tenant context, when getHoldReasonOptions(orgId) is called, then it returns 8 rows ordered by category, each with default_hold_duration_days numeric and default_priority enum in (low,medium,high,critical)
3. Given the schema_json defines required fields, when a row is inserted missing default_hold_duration_days, then JSON-schema validation rejects it (re-uses existing reference_tables validator)

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/holdReasons.test.ts asserting shape + count + ordering before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test holdReasons'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode hold reasons inside 09-QUALITY (must live in reference table per ADR-034)
- Do not skip i18n jsonb column (pl/en/uk/ro per §14.1)

pipeline_inputs.description: Register quality_hold_reasons reference table + seed 8 baseline rows + server helper for hold reason options.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0090 inserts the reference_tables registry entry with schema_json {code,label,category,default_hold_duration_days,default_priority,i18n} and seeds 8 rows. TypeScript helper getHoldReasonOptions queries reference_tables_rows under tenant RLS. Test asserts row count, ordering, and JSON-schema validation rejection for missing fields.

Do not build hold create UI (T-013)
Do not register qa_failure_reasons (T-002) or waste_categories (T-003)
